name: Sunset by boat from Binibeca
description: A sunset boat trip from Cala Torret, next to Binibeca, with cava and cold drinks on board and the whitewashed fishermen's cottages set against the sea. A calm south-eastern coast, ideal for an anchorage and a last swim.

highlights: sailing the south-eastern coast of whitewashed cottages as evening falls
dropping anchor in a sheltered cove for a swim
a toast with cava and snacks on board
